summary: Completed testing of A0 Plugin and EDCM Dashboard features. All 35 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Settings A0 integration card with Local/Cloud tabs, Dashboard page with EDCM metrics gauges, and Chat menu Dashboard link all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: A0 config CRUD working correctly - GET returns defaults, PUT saves and persists mode/URL/port/toggles
EDCM metrics ingest working - accepts full and partial metrics payloads
Dashboard aggregation endpoint correctly returns edcm_metrics, response_times, feedback_stats, totals
All A0/EDCM endpoints properly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
MOCKED: Agent Zero local connection (A0 not running), Google Cloud mode stub only
Frontend A0 Settings card shows both Local Device and Google Cloud tabs with proper fields
Dashboard page displays all 5 EDCM metric gauges with values from ingested test data
seed_data_creation: Created EDCM metrics test data via ingest endpoint (conversation IDs prefixed with test_conv_, dashboard_test_, test_filter_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: A0 Plugin and EDCM Dashboard features fully tested and working. Backend: A0 config CRUD (GET/PUT /api/a0/config), A0 health check (/api/a0/health), EDCM ingest (/api/edcm/ingest), EDCM query endpoints (/api/edcm/metrics, /api/edcm/response-times, /api/edcm/feedback-stats, /api/edcm/dashboard). Frontend: Settings page has A0 Integration card with Local Device and Google Cloud tabs. Dashboard page at /dashboard shows EDCM metrics gauges, response times, feedback stats. Chat menu dropdown includes Dashboard link.
